title: Ribs
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
The drink you spilt all over me
  > [#1, 219 votes] “Lover’s Spit” is a song by Broken Social Scene that was later covered by Feist. Lorde confirmed via Tumblr that the version of the song left on repeat was the BSS version. According to an interview...
"Lover's Spit" left on repeat
My mum and dad let me stay home
  > [#2, 212 votes] Lorde has stated that one of her big stresses are getting old. It’s a common fear, since getting old means getting closer to dying, but also you have more responsibilities. Being able to stay home by...
It drives you crazy, getting old

[Pre-Chorus]
We can talk it so good
  > [#3, 113 votes] “We’re driving Cadillacs in our dreams…” Dreams and imaginations are a recurring theme in Lorde’s music. With just words, stories and pipe dreams can become a fruition. At the best, they can feel...
We can make it so divine
We can talk it good
How you wish it would be all the time

[Chorus]
The drink you spilt all over me
The drink you spilt all over me
  > [#1, see above]
"Lover's Spit" left on repeat
My mum and dad let me stay home
My mum and dad let me stay home
  > [#2, see above]
It drives you crazy, getting old
"Lover's Spit" left on repeat
It drives you crazy, getting old

[Verse 2]
This dream isn't feeling sweet
  > [#4, 145 votes] When she was younger, Lorde thought that growing up would be the greatest thing in the world. Now that she’s more aware of time, her greatest dream transformed into a nightmare. She adds on to this...
We're reeling through the midnight streets
And I've never felt more alone
  > [#5, 164 votes] Lorde feels incredibly lonely in this world, despite the fact that there are people around her, it’s almost as if Lorde doesn’t even recognise their presence. Growing up can be very isolating for...
It feels so scary, getting old

[Pre-Chorus]
We can talk it so good
  > [#3, see above]
We can make it so divine
We can talk it good
How you wish it would be all the time

[Chorus]
This dream isn't feelin' sweet
This dream isn't feeling sweet
  > [#4, see above]
We're reeling through the midnight streets
And I've never felt more alone
And I've never felt more alone
  > [#5, see above]
It feels so scary, getting old
We're reeling through the midnight streets
It feels so scary, getting old

[Bridge]
I want 'em back, I want 'em back
  > [#6, 193 votes] Nostalgia and regret hits Lorde at full throttle. She goes from just fearing growing up to mourning her lost childhood and innocence. Lorde often regrets how she doesn’t let her inner child out as...
The minds we had, the minds we had
How all the thoughts, how all the thoughts
Moved 'round our heads, moved 'round our heads
I want 'em back, I want 'em back
The minds we had, the minds we had
It's not enough to feel the lack
I want 'em back, I want 'em back, I want 'em

[Refrain]
You're the only friend I need (You're the only friend I need)
  > [#7, 230 votes] Lorde craves the innocence of childhood by comparing the fact they’re sharing beds to sleepovers they had when they were younger. They laugh and joke and pretend like things were like they used to...
Sharing beds like little kids (Sharing beds like little kids)
And laughing till our ribs get tough (Laughing till our ribs get tough)
But that will never be enough (But that will never be enough)
You're the only friend I need (You're the only friend I need)
Sharing beds like little kids (Sharing beds like little kids)
And laughing till our ribs get tough (Laughing till our ribs get tough)
But that will never be enough (But that will never be enough)

[Outro]
But that will never be enough
  > [#7, see above]
But that will never be enough
But that will never be enough
But that will never be enough
